message:
chore(beads): deep revision of cross-project integration beads with comprehensive testing specs

Thorough quality review and revision of all 6 cross-project integration
beads created in the previous commit. Changes driven by bv diagnostics
(no cycles, no duplicates) and systematic gap analysis.

Revisions per bead:

bd-2hk9 (fast_cmaes, P2):
- Rewrote description with parameter grouping (A/B/C by sensitivity),
  multi-objective function (0.8 nDCG + 0.2 latency), 5-fold CV
  overfitting prevention, CMA-ES configuration (pop=11, sigma=0.3,
  max_gen=200, seed=42), output artifacts (TOML + JSONL + report)
- Added 7 measurable acceptance criteria
- Added testing notes: 6 unit tests, 6-step e2e script, logging checklist
- Added dependency on bd-3un.24 (TwoTierSearcher must exist)

bd-2ba5 (frankentorch, P4):
- Rewrote with current C++ dependency chain analysis, 6 maturity gates,
  4-phase migration path, feature flag strategy (frankentorch coexists
  with fastembed), auto-detection priority ordering, runtime fallback
- Added 9 acceptance criteria including cosine>0.999 parity threshold
- Added testing notes: 10 unit tests, 3 parity test suites, perf
  benchmark, 7-step e2e script, logging verification

bd-1pfc (frankenjax, P4) — biggest revision:
- Added feature flag strategy: `vmap = ['dep:frankenjax']`
- Added crate placement: frankensearch-embed/src/vmap_batch.rs
- Added error handling: fallback to sequential on vmap failure, WARN
  logging with suppression, dimension validation
- Added 9 acceptance criteria
- Added testing notes: 8 unit tests, 4 integration tests, throughput
  benchmark, 4-step e2e script, structured logging spec
- Added dependency on bd-3un.3 (Embedder trait)

bd-3urr (frankenredis, P4):
- Added feature flag: `cache-persistent = ['dep:frankenredis']`
- Added crate placement: DistributedCacheLayer trait + FrankenredisCache impl
- Added disk space monitoring (WARN at 80% capacity)
- Added clear_embedder(id) for per-embedder invalidation
- Expanded to 12 acceptance criteria
- Testing notes already comprehensive from first pass

bd-3c0e (frankenscipy, P4):
- Description and acceptance criteria already strong from first pass
- Testing notes already comprehensive (10 unit, 5 integration, 7 e2e)

bd-8ks0 (franken_networkx, P4):
- Added dependency on bd-3un.5 (core result types for DocumentGraph)
- Added design clarification comment: diversification algorithm (MMR
  variant with greedy cluster rebalancing), magic number tunability
  (all configurable in GraphRankConfig, candidates for CMA-ES), graph
  persistence model (consumer-provided), scalability notes (CSR for
  large graphs), score inflation cap for expansion phase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
